summary: Backend API testing revealed critical bug in send-message endpoint. 7/8 API endpoints working, but core chat functionality is broken due to AttributeError in LlmChat object.

critical_bugs.issue: AttributeError: 'LlmChat' object has no attribute '_messages' at line 229 in server.py
critical_bugs.impact: Core chat functionality completely broken - users cannot send messages
critical_bugs.error_details: Code tries to access stranger_chat._messages.append() but _messages attribute doesn't exist on LlmChat object from emergentintegrations library

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test frontend chat functionality due to backend send-message endpoint failure

passed_tests: Start chat endpoints work for both platforms
Session validation works for invalid sessions
Error handling for invalid sessions works
success_percentage: Backend: 87.5% (7/8 endpoints), Frontend: 0% (cannot test due to backend issue)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix AttributeError in /api/send-message endpoint at line 229 in server.py. The code tries to access stranger_chat._messages but this attribute doesn't exist on LlmChat object. Need to find correct way to rebuild conversation context for emergentintegrations LlmChat library.
